title: Parliament Budget session LIVE: 193 opposition MPs sign notice seeking motion for CEC's removal
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   During the ongoing Parliament Budget session, 193 opposition Members of Parliament (MPs) have signed a notice.
*   This notice seeks to introduce a motion for consideration in the Parliament.
*   The motion's specific aim is the removal of the Chief Election Commissioner (CEC).

title: Cost escalation and delays haunt Bengaluru Metro project
content:
The Bengaluru Metro project is experiencing significant problems.
*   It is plagued by substantial cost overruns and escalating expenses.
*   The project is also suffering from widespread and persistent delays.

title: Rumours being spread about LPG shortage, says Punjab CM Mann
content:
Rumours are being spread about a potential shortage of LPG.
*   Punjab Chief Minister Mann has acknowledged and addressed these claims.
*   CM Mann clarifies that these concerns regarding an LPG shortage are unfounded rumours.

title: HC disqualification of SNDP Yogam director board a test of Kerala govt.’s mettle
content:
The High Court has disqualified the director board of SNDP Yogam.
*   This ruling is considered a significant challenge for the Kerala government.
*   It will test the government's resolve and ability to manage the situation.

title: LDF’s development narrative in Kollam constituency will face a stiff challenge from UDF
content:
The LDF is banking on its development narrative in the Kollam constituency.
*   This narrative is set to encounter a strong challenge from the UDF.
*   The political contest in Kollam will largely revolve around competing claims about development.

title: T.N. govt. acts firmly on crimes against women and children: Home Secretary
content:
The Tamil Nadu (T.N.) government is taking firm action.
*   These actions specifically address crimes committed against women and children.
*   The announcement was made by the Home Secretary.

title: Cabinet clears Eva Nammava Eva Nammava Bill,  new stadium in Bengaluru
content:
The Cabinet has cleared the "Eva Nammava" Bill.
*   Approval has been given for a new stadium project.
*   The new stadium is to be located in Bengaluru.

title: Congress urges government to hold an all‑party meeting on women’s quota law
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Congress has urged the government.
*   The call is to convene an all-party meeting.
*   The meeting's specific focus is the women’s quota law.

title: Railways launch drive against liquor sale in trains by aboard  staff
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Railways have launched a new drive (campaign).
*   This initiative is aimed at stopping the sale of liquor on trains.
*   The drive specifically targets onboard staff who are involved in these sales.

title: Domestic LPG refill booking systems tested amid customer rush
content:
Domestic LPG refill booking systems are currently undergoing testing.
*   This testing is in response to a significant rush or high demand from customers.
*   The aim is likely to ensure the systems can efficiently manage increased customer load for cooking gas.
